title: [BUG] Excel file needs repair on Mac OS X
author: demobiel

comments.author: demobiel
comments.body: the bug only appears when using the "addTable" method, when using "addRows" it does not happen.

comments.author: alvaro-escalante
comments.body:
Your problem is this bit in the column object that goes on the table

```
style: {
  numFmt: 'yyyy'
}
```
You need to change it to this :

```

var data = {
  columns: [{ name: 'A' }],
  rows: [[new Date()]]
}
...
worksheet.columns = [{ header: 'A', style: { numFmt: 'yyyy' } }]
...
```
